title: Redstone: Reloaded
description: Improves redstone components with cleaner textures and intuitive visual blockstate indicators.
body:
# Redstone: Reloaded
*Enhances redstone components with clean, intuitive visual indicators and improved textures for a more functional and aesthetically pleasing redstone experience. Wall torches are properly attached to surfaces with refreshed textures that maintain vanilla style. Numerical power indicators make redstone wire signal strength instantly readable at a glance.*

## Features
  - Added visual blockstate indicators to sides and bottom of comparators and repeaters
  - Implemented new lock texture with clear blockstate indication
  - Redesigned redstone dust with numerical power level indicators
  - Corrected wall torch attachment points with refined textures
  - Revamped repeater and comparator item textures for better inventory recognition

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
